name: throughline
description: Throughline development kit: a PRD/TDD/ADR design-doc pipeline with phase-gate PRs, an independent design-critique gate, toolchain bootstrap, and gated unattended implementation (failing-test-first + mechanical verify + independent review on a diverse model before any TDD is marked done; one PR per TDD).

plugins.name: throughline
plugins.description: Throughline bootstrap kit: project-setup skill, standard subagents (incl. an independent design-reviewer), gated test-first/verify implementation, and a format+lint hook. Layers on (and depends on) superpowers + pr-review-toolkit.
